Trimsamsa of Mars will make the female garrulous, Venusian Trimsamsa chaste, Mercurial
Trimsamsa male-natured, Jupiterian Trimsamsa a queen and Saturn s Trimsamsa fallen.
11-13. TRIMSAMSA EFFECTS (continued).
In a Sign of Jupiter the Trimsamsa of Mars will make her a gentlewoman with many (of the seven
principal) virtues, the Trimsamsa of Venus a female with evil speech, the Trimsamsa of
Mercury one with knowledge, the Trimsamsa of Jupiter one with many virtues and the
Trimsamsa of Saturn a female desiring limited physical union. Lastly in a Sign owned by
Saturn, a Trimsamsa of Mars will make one servant, that of Venus intelligent, that of Mercury
cruel and devoid of conduct, that of Jupiter a chaste lady and that of Saturn himself one
addicted to base men.
14. BEASTLY LUST OF A FEMALE.
When Venus and Saturn are in mutual aspects in the case of a birth in Taurus, or Libra
Ascendant with Saturns Navansa, the female concerned burnt with sexual lust will unite with
